name: perceptor-monorepo
description: Interactive dependency/behavior map for a code repository — workspaces root.

scripts.build: npm run build -w perceptor-core && npm run compile -w perceptor
scripts.check-types: npm run build:core && npm run check-types -w perceptor-core && npm run check-types -w perceptor
scripts.test: npm run test -w perceptor-core && npm run test -w perceptor
